title: Mystery of the Black Jungle
writer: Emilio Salgari, Gian Paolo Callegari, Piero De Bernardi
actors: Lex Barker, Fiorella Mari, Paul Muller
plot: A group of religious fanatics in India, the Tughs, prey upon Europeans and natives alike, capturing and offering them up in sacrifice to their frightful goddess, Kali. The Governor of the Province sends Tremal Naik, a famous India...
